title: Monday Music Mix #8
summary: And we’re back with yet another edition of MMM!
intro: And we’re back with yet another edition of MMM!

This week’s mix consists of new singles by The Strokes and the very excellent J Mascis (of Dinosaur Jr. fame), a feet tapping mashup by Girl Talk, and This Is Ivy League’s balladesque take on Crown Of Love by the Grammy winning The Arcade Fire.
Special thanks: Zara for her excellent recommendation (Foster The People) :)
Download album | Mirror (in case the first link doesn’t work) (zip format)

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Eighth

And we’re back with yet another edition of MMM! 

This week’s mix consists of new singles by The Strokes and the very excellent J Mascis (of Dinosaur Jr. fame), a feet tapping mashup by Girl Talk, and This Is Ivy League’s balladesque take on Crown Of Love by the Grammy winning The Arcade Fire.

Monday Music Mix: 08

Tracklist:

  1. Sleigh Bells - Tell ‘em
  2. J Mascis - Is It Done
  3. White Hinterland - Icarus
  4. This Is Ivy League - Crown Of Love (originally by The Arcade Fire)
  5. The Strokes - Under The Cover Of Darkness
  6. Foster The People - Pumped Up Kicks
  7. Girl Talk - Here’s The Thing

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Special thanks: Zara for her excellent recommendation (Foster The People) :)

Download album | Mirror (in case the first link doesn’t work) (zip format)

Subscribe to Monday Music Mix podcast (coming soon)

Listen to Grooveshark playlist
